# wesktop config

Manage configuration

## config path

Print the config file path

## config show

Show all config values with source attribution

## config set

Set a config value

### Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
|------|----------|-------------|
| `key` | yes | Config key to set |
| `value` | yes | Value to set |

## config edit

Open the config file in $EDITOR
